UserCosts.title: User Industry Costs
UserCosts.description: Stores the cost inputs for a user per industry.

userId.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the owner.

industry.description: The industry key: bus_diesel, bus_ev, or taxi.

costs.description: Key-value pair of cost parameter IDs to numeric cost values.

UserProfile.title: User Scenario Profile
UserProfile.description: Stores a saved scenario of cost inputs.

/users/{userId}/costs/{industryId}.description: Stores cost inputs mapped to a specific industry for a user.

/users/{userId}/profiles/{profileId}.description: Stores saved scenarios (profiles) for a user.
